svg.title: FinChat Detailed Pipeline with Subparts
svg.desc: Comprehensive pipeline diagram with each major stage broken into detailed subparts and operations

g.text: Combined results, boost duplicates, sort by relevance

text.style: font-style: italic; color: var(--color-text-secondary);;fill:rgb(194, 192, 182);stroke:none;color:rgb(194, 192, 182);stroke-width:1px;stroke-linecap:butt;stroke-linejoin:miter;opacity:1;font-family:"Anthropic Sans", -apple-system, BlinkMacSystemFont, "Segoe UI", sans-serif;font-size:12px;font-weight:400;font-style:italic;text-anchor:start;dominant-baseline:auto

svg.text: Color Legend: Coral=Ingestion | Blue=Embedding/Assembly | Teal=Storage | Green=Retrieval/Frontend | Amber=Reranking | Purple=Query/Citations | Gray=Persistence
